title: alysicarpus rugosus f. pilosulus
intro: Alysicarpus rugosus f. pilosulus, also known as the hairy alysicarpus, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of alysicarpus rugosus f. pilosulus include its potential to aid in the management of various health conditions, such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and powder, to harness its medicinal properties.
